tags.name: Williams Grove Group Camp
tags.description: Open Memorial Day to Labor Day. In old-growth redwoods. Toilets, fire rings, grills, tables provided. Hot pay showers at nearby Burlington or Hidden Springs campgrounds. A nearby summer bridge provides access to miles of backcountry trails.

records.name: Marin Garden Club Grove Group Camp

tags.name: Marin Garden Club Grove Group Camp
tags.description: Open Memorial Day to Labor Day. Lies in a lovely redwood grove on the north end of the old town site of Weott. Toilets, fire rings, grills, tables provided. Hot pay showers at nearby Burlington.
